name: Simplify Budget
description: Personal budget tracker on top of a Google Sheets template

GOOGLE_SA_FILE.description: Absolute path to the Google service account JSON key used for Sheets access.

SPREADSHEET_ID.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the user's copied Simplify Budget sheet.

TRACKER_CURRENCY.description: Base currency code used by the tracker, for example EUR.

TRACKER_CURRENCY_SYMBOL.description: Optional display symbol for the base currency, for example €.
